description: AGE function returns PgInterval, non-nullable when both arguments are non-null

columns.name: elapsed
columns.note: Both arguments are non-null so result is non-null

name: date_age_interval
query_sql:
-- @name AgeInterval
-- @returns :many
SELECT id, AGE(NOW(), occurred_at) AS elapsed FROM events
schema_sql: CREATE TABLE events (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT NOT NULL, occurred_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL);
